HGSS.139.0000:
This is the “Trust” room.\f
It is to show the mutual reliance
between Pokémon and people.
HGSS.139.0001:
Only the Pokéathletes who have
come first in five courses with\r
one Pokémon are allowed here.
HGSS.139.0002:
This is the “Potential” room.
Please go ahead.
HGSS.139.0003:
To win Medals with different kinds of
Pokémon, it is essential to believe in\r
your Pokémon.
HGSS.139.0004: I would love to see my own shoes here!
HGSS.139.0005:
This Dome contains so many
other Domes...
HGSS.139.0007:
Those who have participated in the
Pokéathlon 50 times are commemorated\r
here for their never-yielding spirits.
HGSS.139.0008:
It’s your jersey with
your autograph!
HGSS.139.0009:
Those who have dashed 5,000 times
are commemorated here for their\r
achievement in breaking the\r
legendary record.
HGSS.139.0010:
Cool shoes!
And they’re your model!
HGSS.139.0011:
Those who have switched 200 times
are commemorated here for great\r
teamwork and their bond with\r
their Pokémon.
HGSS.139.0012:
It’s a cool flag!
And it’s yours!
HGSS.139.0013:
Pokéathlon Medals...\f
Those are the proof of the hard work
of both Pokéathletes and Pokémon.\f
Those Pokémon that have won all five
Medals are called “Medalist Pokémon”\r
to commemorate the trust they’ve\r
earned from their Pokéathlete.
